name: Los Venganza Del Almo Chili
recipeIngredient: 2 pounds Pork, cubed (thick Butterfly pork chops)
2 pounds Chuck beef, cut into cubes
1/2 cup Wesson oil or kidney suet
1 teaspoon Mole powder (also called mole poblano)
2 tablespoons Coriander seed (from Chinese parsley, cilantro)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, combine paprika, oregano, MSG, chili powder, cumin, beef bouillon, beer, and 2 cups water. Allow to simmer.
2. In a separate skillet, brown the meat in batches of 1 pound or 1 1/2 pounds with Wesson oil or suet. Drain excess fat and add to the simmering spices. Continue cooking until all meat is done.
3. In another skillet, sauté chopped onions and garlic in 1 tablespoon oil or suet. Add this mixture to the spices and meat. Add water as needed. Simmer for 2 hours.
4. Stir in mole powder, sugar, coriander seed, hot sauce, and tomato sauce. Continue simmering for 45 minutes.
5. Dissolve masa harina flour in warm water to form a paste. Stir this into the chili. Add salt to taste. Allow to simmer for an additional 30 minutes.
6. Adjust heat by adding more Louisiana Red Hot Sauce if desired.
7. Makes 1 pot.
